name: Centaura RP
description:
Only the Dead has seen the end of the War.

This RP will tackle heartbreak, trauma, PTSD, War, and the reality of warfare and what it brings to soldiers on the battlefield. This RP is meant to not just bring a more immersive experience in Centaura, but also bring people aware on what War truly is... a Living Nightmare, never knowing if the day will be your last... and for some advice for the battlefield... Viva la Aquila

Flag of the Antares Imperium (⚔️)

Flag of the Kingdom of Aquila (🛡️)

Flag of the Corvus Confederation (⚔️)

Flag of the Empire of Cetus (🛡️)
